name: 3dview-monorepo
description: 3DView — a host-agnostic Three.js viewer for COLMAP reconstructions and 3D meshes, with VS Code and PyCharm hosts over a shared core.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @3dview/core && npm run build -w 3dview && npm run build -w 3dview-demo
scripts.watch: npm run build -w @3dview/core && npm run watch -w 3dview
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @3dview/core && npm run lint -w 3dview
scripts.test: npm run test -w @3dview/core && npm run test -w 3dview
